slides.title: Creatine isn't for muscle. It's for your *brain*.
slides.sub: The most studied supplement in the gym may do more above your neck. Most people have no idea.

slides.title: It refuels brain energy
slides.body: Your brain runs on ATP. Creatine tops up *phosphocreatine*, the backup battery your neurons tap under load.

slides.title: Most when you're fried
slides.body: The benefit is biggest when you're *sleep-deprived or stressed* — exactly when your mental energy tanks.

slides.title: Sharper, steadier thinking
slides.body: Studies link it to *less mental fatigue* and better short-term memory, with early signals for mood.

slides.title: Five grams, every day
slides.body: A flat *5g daily* is the standard dose. Timing doesn't matter — consistency does.

slides.title: Boringly safe
slides.body: Decades of data make creatine monohydrate *one of the safest* supplements there is. Cheap, too.

slides.title: Stack the habits that *sharpen your day*.
slides.body: Vibe Health ties your sleep, food, and supplements to how you actually feel — so you can see what's really moving your energy.

caption:
Everyone takes creatine for muscle. The brain research is the part nobody talks about. 🧠

It refuels phosphocreatine — your neurons' backup battery — and the payoff is biggest when you're sleep-deprived or stressed. 5g a day, boringly safe. 🔖

Vibe Health ties your habits to how you actually feel → link in bio.
youtube_title: Creatine for the Brain: The Benefit Nobody Talks About
